data.label: Port Call Record
data.description:
A single port call — one vessel arriving at and departing from Porto Sereno.
Business Context: Primary operational record for port authority. Links to cargo, crew, fees, and customs.
Purpose: Document a vessel's visit to Porto Sereno with all associated records

items.label: Flag State
items.description: Country of vessel registration (flag state)

items.label: Port Call ID
items.description: Unique identifier for this port call record. Assigned by Porto Sereno Port Authority.

items.label: Berth Assignment
items.description: Planned berth assignment for a vessel at port.

items.label: Next Port of Call
items.description: Next port after this arrival

items.label: Port of Departure
items.description: Last port of departure

items.label: Vessel Call Sign
items.description: Vessel radio call sign

items.label: Vessel IMO Number
items.description: International Maritime Organization (IMO) number

items.label: Vessel MMSI
items.description: Maritime Mobile Service Identity (MMSI) number

items.label: Vessel Name
items.description: Name of vessel (XdString)

items.label: Voyage Number
items.description: Voyage or trip identifier

items.label: Cargo Type
items.description: Primary type of cargo

items.label: Purpose of Call
items.description: Purpose of port call

items.label: Crew Count
items.description: Total number of crew members aboard the vessel at time of port call. Required for immigration processing, shore leave management, and emergency muster planning.

items.label: Passenger Count
items.description: Total number of passengers aboard the vessel at time of port call. Required for immigration processing, disembarkation planning, and port facility capacity management. Zero for cargo-only vessels.

items.label: Vessel Draft
items.description: Maximum draft (depth below waterline) of the vessel in meters at time of port entry. Critical for channel and berth depth clearance at Porto Sereno harbor.

items.label: Vessel Gross Tonnage
items.description: Vessel's gross tonnage as registered under the IMO Tonnage Convention (1969). Determines applicable port fees, pilotage requirements, and berth assignment at Porto Sereno.

items.label: Vessel Length Overall
items.description: Length overall (LOA) of the vessel in meters, measured from the foremost to the aftermost point. Required for berth assignment and pilotage planning at Porto Sereno.

items.label: Vessel Net Tonnage
items.description: Vessel's net tonnage as registered under the IMO Tonnage Convention (1969). Represents usable cargo capacity. Used for canal transit fees and some port tariff calculations.

items.label: Arrival Date/Time
items.description: Date and time the vessel arrived at Porto Sereno

items.label: Departure Date/Time
items.description:
Date and time the vessel departed Porto Sereno. Null if vessel is currently in port.

---

items.label: Cargo Manifest
items.description:
Cargo loaded or discharged during this port call.
Purpose: Record cargo movements for customs, safety, and tax purposes
Parent Cluster: Port Call Record

items.label: Customs Declaration Filed
items.description: Whether customs declaration has been filed

items.label: Hazardous Cargo
items.description: Whether vessel is carrying hazardous materials

items.label: Business Registry Number
items.description: Cordova Business Registration Number. Format: BIZ-NNNNNN where NNNNNN is a six-digit sequence number assigned at incorporation. Required for all business filings, tax records, and port authority transactions.

items.label: Cargo Description
items.description: Description of cargo contents

items.label: Cargo Destination
items.description: Final destination for this cargo (may be Porto Sereno or transshipment)

items.label: Cargo Origin
items.description: Port or country of origin for this cargo

items.label: Customs Reference Number
items.description: Customs filing reference number

items.label: Hazmat Class
items.description: Hazardous material classes on board (if applicable)

items.label: Container Count
items.description: Number of shipping containers in the cargo consignment measured in TEU (Twenty-foot Equivalent Units). Used for berth planning, crane allocation, and port throughput statistics.

items.label: Cargo Weight
items.description: Total weight of the cargo consignment in kilograms as declared on the bill of lading. Required for vessel stability calculations and port crane scheduling.

items.label: Port Fees
items.description:
Financial charges for this port call. Links to Tax & Revenue domain.
Purpose: Record port fees for billing, tax reporting, and financial auditing
Parent Cluster: Port Call Record

items.label: Fee Type
items.description: Type of port fee assessed

items.label: Payment Status
items.description: Whether the fee has been paid

items.label: Port Fee Amount
items.description: Fee amount assessed for port services in Cordova Córdoba. Includes berth rental, pilotage, tug assistance, waste disposal, and other harbor charges per the Porto Sereno fee schedule.

items.label: Fee Date
items.description: Date the fee was assessed

subject.label: Vessel Owner/Operator
subject.description: The organization that owns or operates the vessel. W3C PROV-DM Agent (Organization) with registry number as identifier.

provider.label: Port Authority
provider.description: Maritime port authority managing vessel traffic, arrivals, and departures. W3C PROV-DM Agent (Organization).
